resources.string: This application requires the latest version of Google Play Services for AR.
This feature requires the latest version of Google Play Services for AR.
Installing Google Play Services for AR…
Tell us more about what\'s happening.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Directly connect to your console for the most accurate and fast results. Permitted console’s IP address is %1$s.

Directly connect to your console for the most accurate and fast results. Before proceeding, please ensure your console’s IP address is %1$s. You can change your connection type later in the application preferences.
Direct connect is only available for UniFi OS Console hosted networks.
Please check your Wifiman support setting in Network -> Settings -> WiFi on your UniFi console
Enable Bluetooth to scan for nearby devices.
Location permission is required for scanning nearby Bluetooth devices.
Location access is required for scanning nearby Bluetooth devices.
Access to Nearby devices is required
No discovery results match your search query
Connect to network to scan for devices.
No Bluetooth signals were found in your area.
Floor Plan Mapper uses device\'s camera and sensors together with ARCore to obtain the information about the device surroundings. ARCore SDK needs to be installed to run the Floor Plan Mapper.
Camera permission is required by Android OS for running the ARCore and to obtain the information about the device surroundings.
Do you want to place it on the map?
Another app is using the camera. Tap on this app or try closing the other one.
Augmented reality engine can\'t find anything on latest frames. Aim device at a surface with more texture or color.
Too dark. Try moving to a well-lit area.
Tracking lost due to bad internal state. Please try restarting the Floor Plan Mapper
Floor Plan Mapper got into unexpected state. Please try again later.
Enabled Location is required by Android OS to get your current SSID and BSSID.
Location permission is required by Android OS to get your current SSID and BSSID.
Move the device slowly to map your surroundings.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s scan?
Android SQLite API based on SQLCipher
An error has occurred when fetching the license.
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Enter Hostname or IP Address to check it\'s latency.
This app does not have any open source licenses.
Please allow access to your cellular signal information.
Please allow access to your location to see nearby WiFi networks and full Speed Factors report.
Please allow access to your location to see nearby WiFi networks.
License details for open source software
Failed to access system accounts. Please try again later
Session expired. Please Sign In again.
Are you sure you want to sign out?
Are you sure you want to forget %1$s account?
Copy your Report Key to clipboard
No access point changes recorded yet
Select up to %1$d Access Points to compare
Location needs to be enabled to access Cellular signal information.
WiFiman needs network connection to map out signal coverage throughout your physical site.
Start to map signal and create your first Floor Plan scan
Connect to any WiFi network to map it\'s signal
WiFiman needs Location & Phone permissions to access cellular signal to map out signal coverage throughout your physical site.
Throughput mapping is not available on this network.
The 2.4 GHz band is prone to interference from other devices and has lower overall speed.
Find the least congested channel in your environment for the %1$s radio and switch to it in the [AP Settings]. Perform the Air Scan and find the best channel.
Find the least congested channel in your environment for the %1$s radio and switch to it through your router\'s settings. Perform the Air Scan and find the best channel.
Switch to a larger channel width through your router\'s settings. Optimal width for the 5 GHz band is 80 MHz or 160 MHz for less congested environments with fewer APs.
Switch to a larger channel width in the [AP Settings]. Optimal width for the 5 GHz band is 80 MHz or 160 MHz for less congested environments with fewer APs.
Switch to a larger channel width through your router\'s settings. Optimal width for 6 GHz band is 160 MHz or 320 MHz for Wi-Fi 7 APs and clients.
Switch to a larger channel width in the [AP Settings]. Optimal width for 6 GHz band is 160 MHz or 320 MHz for Wi-Fi 7 APs and clients.
All factors are performing optimally, enabling the highest speeds.
One or more factors may negatively affect your speed. Follow the provided recommendations to improve performance.
Your device is far from the AP, which may reduce connection quality. Get closer to your AP.
%1$s may not offer the best performance compared to newer standards. WiFi 6, 6E or 7 can provide better speeds and handle more devices.
Frequent retransmissions may degrade network performance. Consider switching to a less congested Wi-Fi channel or get closer to your AP.
High network utilization can slow performance. Limit active devices or high-bandwidth activities or switch to a larger channel width.
Your cellular signal may be weak. Try moving to a different spot or using WiFi.
We\'ve detected WiFiman installed on another device on this network.
We\'ve detected multiple instances of WiFiman installed on other devices on your network. Select a second device to start a speed test between the two devices.
No network connection. Please make sure you have working network connection to run Speed Test.
Unexpected error occurred when running Network Speed test. Please try again.
Please note that speed tests are data-intensive. Are you sure you\'d like to proceed even though you are on metered network?
WiFi inter-device speed (when connected to the same AP) will be generally 50% slower than direct device to internet speed.
Sharing your results can provide data for your ISP in case of any issues.
Check out my #WiFiman Speed test result!\n%1$s
No Speed Test Results Match Search Query
Preferred server of your Internet provider
Due to network issues WiFiman failed to load nearest server information. Please make sure you have working network connection.
Failed to load Speed test servers
Network connection is necessary to load Speed Test servers. Please connect to working network to load nearest Speed Test servers.
Only console owner is allowed to initiate Teleport connection.
You must be connected to the internet in order to access a Teleport network.
Please ensure the console is On and connected to the network with an internet access.
Please enable Teleport in the console\'s settings to allow incoming Teleport connection.
Teleport must be hosted by a Next-Gen gateway or UniFi Cloud Gateway running UniFi OS
Please request a new one to access this console\'s network.
This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
Failed to process Teleport connection. SSO Account or Console couldn\'t be found.
You\'re already authorized to use this Teleport host. Please select it to proceed.
You have been invited to join a network.
Show important updates about Teleport state
The Teleport button has been added to your Quick Settings menu. To remove it, go to your Android Settings.
Adding the Teleport button to your Quick Settings menu allows you to instantly enable Teleport with a single tap.

To setup a secure connection to your UniFi Network the WiFiman app needs to install a VPN profile on your device.

Your network data will be end-to-end encrypted.
We do not collect the content of your communication and do not see what you are browsing. We will collect limited device data, such as your IP address, to connect your device to your UniFi Network at home and to improve our products and services.

By pressing install a system dialog will come up asking for extra permission. Confirm it and the profile will be installed. If you change your mind you can remove the profile by deleting this app or removing the profile at system Settings.
Ensure your host device is on and connected to the internet. If the issue persists, please [contact support].
Teleport has been disabled on the host device. Enable it to connect.
Make sure the host device is on and connected to the internet before trying again.
Your invitation link is no longer valid. Please contact the console’s owner or admin.
An unexpected error occurred. Make sure the host device is on and connected to the internet. If the issue persists, please [contact support].
The console\'s admin must send you an invitation link. Once they do, copy it and try again.
Sorry for the inconvenience. We are trying to resolve this as fast as possible.
Sign In to the UI Account associated with the console network you\'d like to remotely connect to, or use a Teleport invitation link. [Learn more].
Teleport requires a UniFi OS Console
Teleport requires a UniFi OS Console
Teleport Profile Creation Failed. Please turn off all other VPNs if you\'re connected to multiple networks, then try again.
For UniFi Teleport to work, we need to install the UniFi Teleport VPN configuration on your device.
No Dial app available on this device.
No E-Mail app available on this device.
No app available to process the file.
No Web browser app available on this device.
Image sharing is unavailable since there is no app that can process it.
A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please click its enclosed link to activate your account.
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
Account not verified. Please check your email for the verification request.
Failed to store the account information. Please try again.
We do not recognize these credentials. Please ensure you\'ve entered them correctly and try again, or reset them.
Failed to reach the servers. Please check your network connection.
Download UI Verify for one-tap login authentication.
Unrecognized recovery code. Please enter an unused code that was previously generated for your account.
Reached maximal number of code requests for this authentication method. Please choose another method or try again later.
Your six-digit code was sent to your primary authentication app.
Your six-digit code was sent to %1$s.
Your six-digit code was sent to %1$s.
Your six-digit code can be found in your primary authentication app.

To preserve your account\'s security, we cannot reset your MFA configuration on your behalf. As such, if you permanently lose access to all of your authentication methods, you will need to create a new UI SSO account.
Select how you would like to authenticate your account access.
Your login request was denied in the UI Verify app. Tap below to send another verification prompt.
Open UI Verify to approve your login attempt.
Confirm Login in the UI Verify Mobile App
Receive periodic newsletters and updates regarding our products and services.
An account with this email already exists.
Password must have at least 12 characters.
It will be sent to %1$s. Do you want to proceed?
Please enter your UI Account\'s email address.
Please check your inbox for password reset instructions.
Please ensure you\'ve entered the correct address, then resend your password reset email.
An unexpected error prevented us from sending your reset email. Please try again.
We could not find an account associated with this email.
Manage trusted devices in Security Settings.
You’re signed in. Skip multi-factor authentication (MFA) on this device in the future.
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
No access points interfering with channel %1$d
Please enable location services to scan for nearby networks.
Please allow Location access to scan for nearby networks.
No wireless network nearby. If you think this list should contain some results, please make sure WiFi is enabled since some devices need that to list nearby WiFi networks.
Enable Bluetooth scanning for listing nearby devices.

Precise location permission is required by Android to obtain a complete set of information about your network environment, nearby WiFi access points, and Bluetooth devices. Many features are limited without this permission.

We\'ll inform you when WiFiman Wizard firmware updates occur and notify you of key network events, like Teleport connection status changes. You can also enable notifications anytime in your device settings.
Install WiFiman on a second device and connect both devices to the same access point to run a device-to-device Speed Test.
Important status events of WiFiman Wizard connection and FW update state.
Failed to adopt %1$s. Please make sure the device is in range and turned on, then try again.
Failed to update firmware to %1$s. Please try again.
Your WiFiman Wizard was successfully updated to %1$s.
Version %1$s introduces new features and provides an enhanced user experience.
Please do not close the app until the update is complete.
Please enable Bluetooth to discover and connect WiFiman Wizard.
WiFiman needs Bluetooth Low Energy for WiFiman Wizard connection.
Please allow access to your Location and Nearby devices to discover and connect WiFiman Wizard.
Please allow Location access to discover and connect WiFiman Wizard.
